summary: Source watch --since from the local store's first_seen rather than RSS PubDate; upsert all fetched category trends, then return the recency window from the store.
reason: Category-card HTML has no per-trend publication dates, so the previous withinPubDateCutoff check was always lenient and --since was effectively a no-op. first_seen is the only reliable time signal we have for category-page sources, and it gives --since the obvious meaning of "trends discovered in my store in the last N time". Greptile blocking finding on PR #548.
